body: Hey Priya, my sister's wedding is July 19-21 in Portland and I'd really love to bring Noah. I know that's your weekend. Would you be open to swapping? I could give you the following weekend plus the Monday.
That's a big deal, of course he should be at his aunt's wedding. The following weekend works for me but I actually have something the Monday after. Could I take a Friday instead? Like July 26?
July 26 Friday works perfectly. So you'd have him July 19 evening through July 21, then I take him back, and you get him back July 25 (Thursday night) through Sunday instead of the standard weekend?
Actually can we do Thursday pickup at 6 instead of Thursday night? I'd like to take him to his swim lesson Thursday evening.
Done. 6pm Thursday July 25 pickup, you keep him through Sunday the 28th. I'll put it in the app. Thanks for being flexible on the wedding, it really means a lot.
Of course. He's going to love it. Can you send me a couple photos from the wedding? He'll want to show me.
